canonical_goal: Rust-first Healthpoint API SDK, CLI, MCP server, and future open_social_data adapter
implemented_surfaces: HealthpointClient configurable base URL/auth/geo mode
FHIR HealthcareService mapping with identifiers, eligibility, availability, characteristics, service provision codes, endpoints, comments, and raw FHIR preservation
FHIR Location mapping with identifiers, physical type, address, position, partOf, endpoints, and hours
FHIR Organization mapping with identifiers, types, aliases, partOf, endpoints, and contacts
redacted API error handling and redacted diagnostic status
safe FHIR id validation before path-segment construction
response metadata capture for ETag, Last-Modified, Retry-After, request-id, and rate-limit headers
CLI doctor/search/get/get-uri/inspect/export/fixture/schema/policy commands
local service exports with manifest sidecars
MCP diagnostic/search/SNOMED/nearby/get/read-resource-uri tools
healthpoint:// resource URI parser
offline FixtureDirectoryProvider
OSD-style services/locations/organizations/code/contact/eligibility/availability tabular rows
Conductor metadata-only setup path for environments without Cargo
metadata-only static preflight script and GitHub workflow wiring
synthetic Healthpoint-like FHIR HTTP mock server
interim JSON Schema contracts under contracts/schemas
Conductor status command and expanded handoff documentation
GitHub issue templates and PR safety checklist
release runbook, threat model, live contract capture plan, RMCP pin plan
validated_in_current_environment: bin/mock-healthpoint-server served synthetic CapabilityStatement and FHIR resources
bin/conductor-status rendered state without private context
blocked_by: apt-get network access timed out in current sandbox
compile-time validation of rmcp API surface
